title: pixel.product.renderer.v1 Output Schema
description: Output from Pixel Product Renderer. Returns metadata for each generated render; the actual image files are returned as output attachments. The model internals, style transfer parameters, and post-processing pipeline details are not exposed.

renders.description: List of rendered product images. Each entry corresponds to an output attachment file.

attachment_role.description: The role name of the corresponding output attachment (e.g. 'rendered_image_1').

width.description: Width of the rendered image in pixels.

height.description: Height of the rendered image in pixels.

format.description: File format of the rendered image.

background_applied.description: The background style that was applied to this render.

angle_applied.description: The camera angle used for this render.

render_time_ms.description: Total server-side rendering time in milliseconds.

model_version.description: Internal renderer model version used for this job.

background_removal_applied.description: Whether background removal was applied to the source product photo before rendering.
